description: Static fallback catalog of common SA360 Reporting API v0 field prefixes. Seeded from https://developers.google.com/search-ads/reporting/query/query-structure. Used when the live sa360_search_fields call is unavailable (e.g. credentials not provisioned, SA360-reporting entitlement gated) so callers can still discover field groupings.
notes: Use the live `sa360_search_fields` tool for the authoritative field list; call `sa360_list_report_columns` (this tool) for a quick browse of the standard groupings.
Field names are dotted (e.g. `campaign.id`). Select them via the SA360 report query DSL: `SELECT campaign.id, metrics.clicks FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS`.
Cost values are always micros (1 USD = 1_000_000). Divide by 1_000_000 before displaying to humans.
Not every metric is selectable alongside every resource; the live searchAds360Fields endpoint declares `selectable_with` constraints that this static catalog does not model.
